intro: Idealista Property Scraper is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for real estate. 🎯 Monthly Subscription: $15/month + Idealista Property Scraper API costs per property This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.
useCases: 📏 Area, number of rooms and bathrooms

faq.q: How do I run Idealista Property Scraper?
faq.a: Open Idealista Property Scraper on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.
Idealista Property Scraper runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.
